titles.map: Show the photos on a map
titles.faceSearch: Find a person among untagged photos
titles.recognition: Scan everyone for matches among unnamed faces
titles.expand: Grow an album or a label with similar photos
titles.review: Go through the suggestions one at a time

emptyCatalog.title: There are no photos yet

search.title: Search
search.degraded: Search by content is temporarily unavailable right now. Showing text-based results instead.

empty.title: Nothing found
empty.hint: Try a different term or adjust the filters.
empty.hintQuery: Nothing matches “{{query}}”. Try a broader term or fewer filters.

search.unknownTokens: I don't understand these filters (searching them as plain text):

help.title: Search query language
help.intro: Mix free text with key:value filters in one query. An unknown filter does no harm — it is searched as plain text and the search points it out.
help.example: dovolená camera:"Canon EOS R6" iso:100-400 faces:2

op.and: A space between filters means AND.
op.or: A pipe inside a value means OR.
op.not: An exclamation mark negates a value (photos without the label).
op.notText: A minus before a word excludes free text.
op.range: Ranges with a dash; either side may be open.
op.quotes: Quotes for values with spaces; \ escapes |, ! and -.
op.wildcard: An asterisk is a wildcard inside a text value.

desc.text: The photo's title, description and notes.
desc.album: Photos in an album (by title or UID).
desc.label: Photos carrying a label (by name or UID).
desc.person: Photos with a person (by name or UID).
desc.flag: Your flag: pick, reject or eye.
desc.takenAdded: Capture date / date added to the catalogue: YYYY, YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD.
desc.beforeAfter: Taken before a date / on or after a date.
desc.geo: Photos with GPS coordinates, or without them.
desc.near: Photos geographically near the given photo; dist: is the km radius (default 5).
desc.camera: Camera make or model, and the lens.
desc.optics: ISO, aperture, focal length in mm and megapixels.
desc.type: Media type: image, video or live.
desc.faces: Face count (faces:3 = at least three); face:new = a face nobody named yet.

searchCommand.idle: Start typing to search across your library.

stats.capped: Showing the {{count}} most suspicious. Raise the threshold to narrow the list.

metadata.locationActionFailed: The location could not be saved. Please try again.

metadata.notesPrompt: Anything you want to jot down about this photo
metadata.aiNotePrompt: A description the computer added to the photo by itself
metadata.takenAtPrompt: For example 24 December 1998 — even a guess beats nothing

notFound.message: The requested page does not exist.

import.title: Import & migration
import.intro: PhotoPrism stays the primary store. Imports are read-only, incremental and repeatable — it is safe to run them again and they resume where they left off.
import.warnFirstRun: A first run can take a while and pull in a large number of photos. Subsequent runs only process new changes.
import.confirmFirstRun: This is the first run for this source and may take a while. Start the import?
import.maintainerOnly: This page is available to system maintainers only.
import.photoprismDesc: Incremental import from a running PhotoPrism instance (photos, metadata, albums, labels, people).
import.photosorterDesc: Direct migration from the photo-sorter database (photos, embeddings, faces, albums, labels).
import.startedNotice: The import has been queued and will start shortly.
import.conflictNotice: An import is already in progress.
import.errorNotice: Failed to start the import. Please try again.

trash.title: Trash

empty.title: Trash is empty
empty.hint: Archived photos appear here until their retention period runs out.

trash.unavailable: Permanent deletion is disabled in the server configuration.

confirm.title: Delete permanently?
confirm.single: This photo, including its original, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulk_one: {{count}} photo, including its original, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulk_other: {{count}} photos, including their originals, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
confirm.empty: Every photo in the trash, including originals, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

maintenance.title: Library maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Check integrity between the catalogue and the files on disk, and repair derived data. Originals are never deleted.
maintenance.maintainerOnly: This page is available to system maintainers only.

scan.title: Scan result
scan.summary: {{photos}} photos · {{files}} files in DB · {{disk}} originals on disk
scan.summaryHint: These numbers should roughly match; a larger gap between the catalogue and disk means something drifted — missing originals (in the catalogue, not on disk) or orphan files (on disk, not in the catalogue), see below.
scan.empty: No scan has run yet. Run an integrity scan.

descriptions.missing_originals: The photo exists in the catalogue but its original file is gone from disk or storage — a real risk of data loss, worth attention.
descriptions.orphan_files: An original file sits in storage but belongs to no catalogue photo (never imported). The “Import orphan originals into the catalogue” repair adds them.
descriptions.missing_thumbnails: The photo has no generated thumbnail; the grid may show it slowly or blank. Fixed by the thumbnails repair.
descriptions.missing_embeddings: The photo has no AI vector, so similarity or content search won't find it. Filled in once the AI box is online.
descriptions.missing_faces: Face detection hasn't run for the photo yet, so it won't appear under people. Filled in once the box is online.
descriptions.missing_phashes: The photo has no perceptual fingerprint, used to find near-duplicates.

repair.title: Repairs
repair.hint: Choose what to repair. Repairs don't run instantly — they are enqueued as background jobs. Embeddings and face detection also wait for the AI box to come online.
repair.import_orphans: Import orphan originals into the catalogue
repair.result: Scheduled: thumbnails {{thumbnails}}, hashes {{phashes}}, embeddings {{embeddings}}, faces {{faces}}; orphans imported {{imported}}, skipped {{skipped}}, failed {{failed}}.

jobs.title: Background job queue
jobs.intro: The background queue that runs the repairs and backfills (thumbnails, embeddings, faces…). Dead jobs can be revived on the System status page.

duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.subtitle: Review groups of near-identical photos. Pick the one to keep and archive the rest, or dismiss a group as not a duplicate. Archived photos go to the trash and can be restored.

merge.title: Merge duplicates
merge.body: Keep this photo and merge the others into it. Nothing is lost — the kept photo inherits every album, tag and person the copies had.
merge.nothingMoves: The kept photo already has everything

duplicates.phashDistanceTitle: Perceptual-hash distance to the kept photo (lower is more similar)
duplicates.embeddingDistanceTitle: Embedding distance to the kept photo (lower is more similar)
duplicates.unavailable: Duplicate detection is disabled in the server configuration.

empty.title: No duplicates found
empty.hint: Nothing looks like a near-duplicate right now.

compare.title: Compare duplicates
compare.groupNote: Pair {{current}} of {{total}} in this group — each copy is compared against the suggested keeper.
compare.archiveNote: The copy you do not keep is archived to the trash, never deleted. Removing it for good is a separate, manual act from /trash.

diff.identical: Every compared field is identical on both photos.

done.title: All done
done.hint: You have resolved every pair we found.

descriptions.total: Every job on record, including ones that have already finished.
descriptions.queued: Waiting to be processed — including jobs scheduled for a retry and jobs deferred while the AI box is offline (they wait without using up their retry budget).
descriptions.failed: Permanent, non-retryable failures (usually 0 — ordinary failures retry and then end up as “Dead”).
descriptions.dead: The job failed even after all attempts were used up (default max 5) and was set aside. It will not run again on its own — it must be manually requeued (the “Requeue dead-letter jobs” button on the System status page). A high count usually means a job type keeps failing, or the box was unreachable for a long time.
descriptions.pending: Jobs for the AI box (embeddings and face detection) waiting in the queue for the box to come back online.

system.title: System status
system.subtitle: Operational health of the running instance — database, embeddings, job queue, backups, imports and storage.
system.maintainerOnly: This page is available to system maintainers only.
system.error: Failed to load the system status.

embeddings.title: Embeddings (box)
embeddings.offlineHint: Box is offline → {{n}} embedding jobs are queued and will resume once the box is back online.

jobs.title: Job queue
jobs.intro: The background job queue that processes repairs and data backfills. Dead jobs can be requeued with the button below.
jobs.requeueError: Failed to requeue the dead-letter jobs.

maps.title: Maps (mapy.com)
maps.keyRejectedHint: mapy.com is rejecting the API key (expired, revoked or out of credits). The map stays without tiles until the key is replaced in the mapy.com console.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: The local accounts of this instance. Accounts are never deleted — they are retired by disabling, so their history stays intact.
users.adminOnly: This page is available to administrators only.
users.selfDisableHint: You cannot disable your own account.
users.maintainerManageHint: Only a system maintainer can manage this account.

empty.title: No users
empty.hint: Create the first account with the “New user” button.

form.noteHint: Internal note, visible to administrators only.

password.title: Change the password of {{username}}
password.hint: A new password signs the user out of every device immediately. The current password is never shown — only its hash is stored.

confirm.disableBody: {{username}} will no longer be able to sign in and is signed out of every device immediately. The account can be enabled again later.
confirm.enableBody: {{username}} will be able to sign in again.

errors.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.noteTooLong: The note may be at most {{max}} characters.
errors.generic: The action could not be completed.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: A durable record of changes on this instance, newest first. Filter by actor, action, entity or date.
audit.adminOnly: This page is available to administrators only.
audit.error: The audit log could not be loaded.

empty.title: No entries
empty.hint: No events match the current filters. Try relaxing them.

expand.title: Expand a collection
expand.subtitle: Find photos that look like the ones already in an album or on a label, and add them in one step.

form.sourcesError: Albums and labels failed to load.

error.search: The similarity search failed. Please try again.
error.reject: The rejection could not be saved; the photo stays in the results.

idle.title: Pick a collection to expand
idle.hint: Choose an album or a label and Kukátko finds photos that look like its current members — ready to be added.

noEmbeddings.title: The collection's photos have no embeddings yet
noEmbeddings.hint: The collection has photos, but none of them has an embedding computed yet. Embeddings are computed while the compute box is online — try again later.

emptyCollection.title: The collection is empty
emptyCollection.hint: The chosen album or label holds no photos, so there is nothing to be similar to.

noResults.title: No similar photos
noResults.hint: Nothing cleared the similarity threshold. Try lowering it and searching again.

summary.sampled: A sample of {{sampled}} of {{count}} source photos was used.
summary.voteRule_one: A photo must match at least {{count}} source photo.
summary.voteRule_other: A photo must match at least {{count}} source photos.
summary.ordering: Sorted by match count, then by similarity.
summary.allHandled: Every found photo has been handled — run the search again for more.

question.label: Does the label {{name}} fit this photo?

review.faceHint: The face under review is highlighted with a frame.

empty.libraryHint: There are no named people or labels yet to build questions from.
empty.queueHint: No questions right now. New ones appear as photos or suggestions arrive.

errors.load: The question queue failed to load.
errors.undo: The answer could not be undone.
